questionHtml:
A quantity of 2.00 mol of an ideal gas is maintained at a temperature of 127 ºC in a container of volume 0.083 m3. What is the pressure of the gas?

A. 8 kPa

B. 25 kPa

C. 40 kPa

D. 80 kPa

meta.title: A quantity of 2.00 mol of an ideal gas is maintained at a temperature of 127 ºC in a container of volume 0.083 m3. What is the pressure of the gas? A. 8 kPa B. 25 kPa C. 40 kPa D.
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
